description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8.9 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Include a before_script that runs `npm install gitbook-cli -g`, `gitbook fetch latest`, and `gitbook install`. Define two stages, test and deploy: in the test stage add a `test` job that executes `gitbook build . public`, runs on all branches except master, and has no artifacts; in the deploy stage add a `pages` job that also runs `gitbook build . public`, publishes the `public` folder as an artifact that expires after one week, and only runs on the master branch.
